entries.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
highlights: Building reporting and analytics tools for enterprise conversation intelligence.
Processing millions of call records for clients including General Motors.

entries.title: UAV & Rocket Stabilisation
highlights: Fixed-wing UAV design in Fusion 360.
IMU stabiliser with real-time PID loops for model rockets.

entries.title: Street Keeper
highlights: GPS-to-street matching engine built on PostGIS spatial queries.
Webhook pipeline, background job processing, on-demand city sync.

entries.title: Gloomhunt
highlights: Custom game engine with deterministic replay and server-side score verification.
Double-entry financial ledger for real-money payouts. 50,000+ lines, 230 tests.

entries.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Shipped AI chatbots in regulated pharma; 95% intent accuracy.
React UAT tooling adopted team-wide.

entries.title: IT Help Adviser
highlights: Front-line support for students and staff.
Documented fixes and ran team knowledge-sharing sessions.

entries.title: Intern Computing Teacher
highlights: Supported KS3 and KS4 computing lessons and practical coding sessions.

entries.title: Contract Game Developer
highlights: In-game store with real-currency purchases and payment APIs.
API documentation for the game platform.

entries.title: Robot Dojo
highlights: Custom database management system, text processing engine, global state architecture.
Deployed to production and still running live.

entries.title: Full-Stack Engineer
highlights: UI redesign and admin dashboard in a weekly-shipping startup.

entries.title: Kevvlar
highlights: Real-time collaboration via WebSockets, Stripe billing, Twilio video.
~150 users, live since 2021. React, Node.js, MongoDB, Redis.

entries.title: BSc Software Engineering
highlights: Industrial placement at Eli Lilly; final-year project Street Keeper.
First Class honours. Graduated July 2026.

entries.title: BEng Chemical Engineering
highlights: Engineering degree before moving into software in the UK.
